en: A: How did you get here?
I came on foot.
A: What kind of car did you take?
B: I came by bus.
A: How do you go to church?

ab: kmuyit toruy yaba mu, glgan cu nya mluw mosa.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: heya ga maha kenu mosa pwasan biru kryax?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: heya ga mluw toruy iyik uraw mosa pwasan biru.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: maha kenu mosa bayi rami uya su?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?
B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.
A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?
B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.
A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: mluw glgan mlaka mosa Lanyiy heya.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: mluw lalu toruy mosa Takaw heya?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: mluw spito kisya mosa Takaw heya.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ang, mnluw kisya mosa Tayto heya.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.
A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: iyat, mnluw glgan mlaka mosa Tayto heya.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.
A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: kyan, kura gleng khani lga texan su glgan basu la.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: cyu inu ku sobeh ci glgan iyik uraw cahay?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: ungat glgan iyik uraw nya cahay, nanak haya glgan su.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: pisa ryax nya mluw ta glgan basu ga tehok ta pwasan biru?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: mpu magan pungkang lga tehok pwasan biru la.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: pisa ryax nya mluw ta spito kisya ga tehok ta Taycyu?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: utux tmuting lga tehok Taycyu la.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: bsya ryax nya kmuyit toruy mosa ta alang Ulay?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?
B: It takes about an hour.

ab: mluw su glgan iyik uraw ga knwan tehok su sali mu?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?
B: It takes 20 minutes.
A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?
B: I can ride a bicycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I have a motorcycle.
A: Do you have a motorcycle?
B: I don't have a motorcycle.
